findings.message: Missing return statement on the success path. get_item() is declared to return Item and has response_model=ItemRead, but when the item is found the function falls off the end and implicitly returns None. FastAPI will then try to serialize None against ItemRead and raise a ResponseValidationError (500), so every successful lookup fails.
findings.suggestion: Add `return item` after the HTTPException branch.

findings.message: Falsy check on the ORM result is the wrong predicate for a 'not found' test. `session.get()` returns either an Item instance or None; using `if not item:` relies on truthiness of the ORM object, which is fragile (and the in-code comment itself flags this). It should be an explicit identity check against None so the 404 path triggers only on a true miss.
findings.suggestion: Replace `if not item:` with `if item is None:`.
